title: membership — HTTP routes
description: Tenant plane: customer + guardian views of memberships + plans + renewals + passes. Admin manages the plan catalog + reissues passes + generates reports. Platform plane: cross-tenant support tooling for escalations + refund investigations. Explicit /pause + /resume + /cancel endpoints separate state-machine transitions from data updates (no free-form status writes). Session check-in consumes passes via a dedicated /passes/{pass}/consume endpoint gated on the session module's Sanctum token.

routes.description: filter[branch_id], filter[athlete_id], filter[membership_plan_id], filter[status], filter[primary_guardian_id], filter[has_open_dunning]. Guardians see only their family's memberships via .own scope. Includes: athlete + plan + primary_guardian + region + branch. Aggregations: revenue_this_period, active_membership_count.

Body: MembershipCreateData { athlete_id, membership_plan_id, primary_guardian_id?, coupon_code?, payment_method_id }. Consumes membership_slot. Atomic invoice creation. Freezes price/coupon/tax snapshots. Fires MembershipCreated. Returns { membership, invoice, payment_intent }.

Includes: athlete + plan + primary_guardian + region + branch + coupon_snapshot + tax_calculation_snapshot + open_renewal + recent_renewals + passes_current_period + passes_remaining_count + lifetime_value_cents + refund_history.
Body: { state_reason?: string }. Transitions active → paused. Freezes renewal + pass consumption. Fires MembershipPaused.
Transitions paused → active. Recomputes next_renewal_at from resume date + remaining period. Fires MembershipResumed.

Body: { cancellation_kind: 'soft_period_end'|'hard_immediate', cancellation_reason: string }. Soft (default) → membership ends at period boundary, no refund. Hard (Enterprise gated) → immediate termination + prorated refund via refund module. Fires MembershipCancelled.
Renewal history for the membership. filter[status]. Chronological with attempt_number visible — customers can see 'attempt 2 of 4' during dunning.

Admin-only. Body: { count: int, pass_type: 'bonus'|'promotional', valid_until?: iso8601 }. Issues extra passes outside the normal per-period grant. Audit-critical — every reissue creates an audit row with admin identity.
All passes for the membership. filter[status: available|consumed|expired|refunded], filter[valid_from], filter[valid_until]. Grouped by period.

Admin dashboard. filter[branch_id], filter[period]. Metrics: active_count, MRR (monthly recurring revenue), ARR (annual recurring), churn_rate_last_30d, lapse_rate_last_30d, trial_conversion_rate_last_30d, dunning_recovery_rate. NOT for customer consumption — RBAC gates to admin/owner.

groups.name: tenant-my-memberships
groups.description: Guardian / adult-athlete facing 'my memberships' surface. Auto-scoped by user's AthleteGuardian rows + self as adult athlete.

routes.description: List memberships where athlete belongs to the current user (adult) OR to an athlete via active AthleteGuardian. Includes payment status indicators for dunning awareness.
filter[branch_id], filter[age_group_id], filter[is_active], filter[billing_interval]. Public-tier readable: customers see the catalog for the signup flow.
Body: MembershipPlanCreateData. Consumes membership_plan_slot. Validates entitlements (trial_days, addon_config gates). Fires MembershipPlanCreated.

Body: MembershipPlanUpdateData (excludes tenant_id, branch_id, age_group_id, currency + billing_interval when active memberships exist). Price + trial_days + passes_per_period + addon_config are patchable but affect only new memberships.
Body: { branch_id?, slug?, name? }. Creates a new plan with the same shape at (default) the same or (optional) a different branch. Slug regenerated if collision.
Customer-facing pass wallet — passes belonging to memberships the user is responsible for. Grouped by athlete + membership. Shows remaining count + valid_until for each.
INTERNAL API. Called by session check-in flow with Sanctum token abilities:['sessions.check-in']. Body: { session_id: ULID }. Idempotent — refuses when consumed_at already set. Fires PassConsumed.

groups.name: platform-memberships
groups.description: Cross-tenant support tooling for escalations + refund investigations.

routes.description: Cross-tenant. filter[tenant_id], filter[status], filter[has_recent_chargeback]. PII from athletes redacted when minor.
Full membership detail including snapshots + renewal history + refund history. For support case escalations.
